name: Fish and Stoffle
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh or frozen hake, cod, or any firm, white fish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix milk, egg, mustard, and seasonings.
2. Pour the mixture over bread cubes and toss until the bread absorbs the milk.
3. Place the mounded mixture in a lightly buttered 3-quart baking dish.
4. Arrange the fish on top of the dressing.
5. Cover with melted butter or strips of bacon.
6. Sprinkle with paprika, chives, or parsley for eye appeal.
7. Bake at 375°F until the fish flakes easily. Baking time will depend on the thickness of the fish and whether it is frozen or fresh.
